analysisSummary: Re-reading consumeEvents confirms the scanner buffer bound was the only limit protecting NDJSON line size. Valid assistant events above that threshold terminate the stream with scanner.Err(), so the disconnect is reachable and not masked elsewhere.

runSubprocess only parsed the buffered stdout after the subprocess exited. Once stdoutBuf was truncated, the final result entry was no longer available to parse, and no separate result capture existed before this fix.
